title: Pet Munchies Wild Salmon and Sweet Potato Dog Treats, Healthy Grain Free Dental Sticks with Natural Real Meat 90g
features: 100% NATURAL, PREMIUM REAL WILD SALMON: This gourmet dental treat is made with 100% natural, human-grade wild salmon and sweet potato - delicately roasted to perfection with a flavour dogs love

HEALTHY & FULL OF NATURAL GOODNESS: These dental chews are grain and gluten free, low in salt and a great source of dietary fibre with Omega 3 that promotes optimal brain & eye function, making them the perfect healthy treat to feed your four legged friend
FOR A HEALTHY SKIN & COAT: Rich in antioxidants, minerals and vitamins, these dental treats are also essential for promoting and maintaining a healthy skin and coat
GREAT FOR TEETH & GUMS: Designed to satisfy your dogs natural instinct to chew, helping to remove tartar and plaque to support good oral health

SUITABLE FOR ALL BREEDS & SIZES: Our wild salmon and sweet potato treats are suitable for all breeds of dogs and puppies over 4 months - please remember that these treats should make up a small part of your pet's balanced diet
